channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: LEGO is building a huge solar park at its new US factory
item.description: The LEGO Group is installing a large solar array at its new US factory in Chesterfield County, Virginia, as it moves toward powering the site with 100% renewable energy. more…

item.title: Elon Musk reveals date of Tesla Full Self-Driving’s next massive release
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk revealed the date of Full Self-Driving’s next massive release: v14.3. For months, Tesla owners with Hardware 4 have been utilizing Full Self-Driving v14.2 and subsequent releases. Currently, the most up-to-date FSD version is v14.2.2.5, which has definitely brought out mixed r...

item.title: The Genesis GV90 looks massive charging next to the Hyundai IONIQ 5
item.description: The GV90 is set to arrive as the largest, most prestigious Genesis electric SUV to date. With its debut approaching, the flagship EV was spotted charging alongside a Hyundai IONIQ 5, revealing its true size. more…

item.title: Anker SOLIX alternator charger bundles for gen 2 C1000, C2000, F3000 power stations at exclusive lows from $749, Segway, tools, more
item.description: Our Thursday Green Deals headliner focuses on the alternator charger bundles available for Anker’s SOLIX C1000 Gen 2, C2000 Gen 2, and F3000 power stations – all of which are hitting returning or new exclusive low prices from $749 during the updated/expanded Spring Sale event . We also shined a s...

item.title: This One Brand's EVs Beat Their EPA Range Ratings Better Than The Rest
item.description: Consumer Reports tested the real-world highway range of nearly 30 electric cars. See the winners and losers.

item.title: The new BMW i3 will go on sale soon, but another EV is on its way out
item.description: With the new i3 set to go on sale later this year, BMW is planning to discontinue another EV to make room for it. more…

item.title: The last domino falls: Stellantis EVs now have Tesla Supercharger access
item.description: As of today, Jeep, Dodge and Stellantis EVs can plug in and charge on Tesla’s Supercharger network, the largest DC charging network in North America. Stellantis was the last brand set to gain access, so now just about every EV in America can use Superchargers, with the right adapters. more…

item.title: Chattanooga Charge: Tesla and EV fans ready for the Southeast’s wildest Tesla party
item.description: Hundreds of like-minded Tesla and EV enthusiasts are descending on Chattanooga Charge this weekend for the largest Tesla meet in the Southeast. Taking place on March 20–22, 2026 at the stunning Tennessee Riverpark. If you were there last year, you’ll know that it’s the ultimate experience to see ...

item.title: Lexus launches the ES EV with over 300 miles of range, undercuts rival prices
item.description: The luxury electric sedan is more affordable than expected. Lexus launched the 2026 ES EV with over 300 miles of range and prices starting under $50,000. more…

item.title: Tesla Full Self-Driving gets latest bit of scrutiny from NHTSA
item.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) has elevated its probe into Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (Supervised) suite to an Engineering Analysis. The analysis impacts roughly 3.2 million vehicles across the company’s entire lineup, and aims to identify how the suite’s degradation de...

item.title: BYD is now giving away 18 months of free 5 minute EV charging as gas prices surge
item.description: Buy the new Song Ultra EV, and BYD will give you 18 months of ultra-fast charging, for free. With gas prices soaring, electric vehicles are looking even more attractive. more…

item.title: SUPER73 debuts new e-bike lineup with modular batteries and commuter focus
item.description: SUPER73 is back with a major shake-up to its lineup. The Southern California-based electric bike brand has just unveiled its all-new A-Series, a collection of redesigned models that signal a shift toward more practical, commuter-friendly machines while still leaning into the company’s signature m...

item.title: Tesla is one stop away from having to recall FSD in NHTSA visibility crash probe
item.description: NHTSA has escalated its investigation into Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” system’s inability to handle reduced visibility conditions, upgrading the probe to an Engineering Analysis covering an estimated 3,203,754 vehicles — the step that typically precedes a recall. The agency found that FSD’s degra...

item.title: Uber to invest over 1 billion dollars in Rivian to deploy tens of thousands of R2 robotaxis
item.description: Rideshare behemoth Uber announced a massive new partnership with Rivian, in which it will invest over one billion dollars in the American automaker to deploy up to 50,000 all-electric robotaxis, beginning with the new R2 SUV . more…

item.title: Xiaomi launches next-gen SU7 with 902 km range and LiDAR, still undercuts Tesla
item.description: Xiaomi is officially launching the next-generation SU7 electric sedan today with a sweeping set of upgrades — up to 902 km of CLTC range, standard LiDAR across all trims, and an 897V charging architecture on the top model. The updated sedan starts at 229,900 yuan (~$33,000), still undercutting th...

item.title: Buying a used EV? What you should know about batteries, warranties, and more
item.description: The price of gas is rising almost as fast as the price of new cars, pushing more shoppers toward the cheapest low-mile used options on dealer lots: off-lease EVs. But while the deals look good, first-time EV buyers still have concerns. Here’s what used EV buyers need to know about batteries, warr...

item.title: This beautiful Icelandic e-bike is taking on the premium eMTB world
item.description: Iceland isn’t exactly known for doing things the easy way. Between volcanic terrain, unpredictable weather, and long stretches of rugged wilderness, it’s the kind of place that tends to shape products around necessity rather than excess. And that philosophy is exactly what shows in Lauf Cycles’ n...

item.title: SpaceX’s Starship V3 is almost ready and it will change space travel forever
item.description: SpaceX is closing in on one of the most anticipated rocket launches in history, as the company readies for a planned April test launch and debut of its next-gen Starship V3 “Version 3”. The latest iteration of Starship V3 has a slightly taller Super Heavy booster and Starship upper stage than the...

item.title: Tesla Shines Amid EV Slowdown in China — February 2026 Sales Report
item.description: After the usual December EV record sales peak in China, which coincided with an end-of-incentive sales rush (NEVs are no longer exempt from purchase tax this year), and adding to the Chinese New Year happening in February, EVs had an expected sales slump, down by 32% — which sounds like ... [co...

item.title: New EV fee proposals charge owners 2-3x what gas drivers pay in federal tax
item.description: A growing number of states and federal lawmakers are pushing flat annual fees of $200 to $250 on electric vehicles, amounts that charge EV owners two to three times more than what the average gas car driver pays in federal fuel tax. The proposals are being framed as a way to fund road infrastruct...

item.title: A solid-state EV battery that can achieve 800 miles of driving range — It’s becoming a reality
item.description: Solid-state batteries are called the “holy grail” of EV battery tech for a reason, right? The new battery tech is quickly moving from the lab to the real world, with some claiming to unlock over 800 miles of driving range. more…

item.title: Toyota locks in power from a massive new Texas solar farm
item.description: Avantus and Toyota Tsusho America have completed construction of a 159 MWdc solar project in Texas, adding another large-scale clean energy asset to the state’s fast-growing solar fleet. more…

item.title: Range Rover’s next electric SUV is bringing an entirely new look inside and out
item.description: The electric Range Rover Velar will look nothing like the gas-powered SUV on sale today. With its debut nearing, the Velar EV was spotted with a sleek fastback-like design and a bigger infotainment screen on the inside. more…

item.title: GM–LG shifts a US plant from EV batteries to LFP energy storage
item.description: Ultium Cells , the joint venture between General Motors and LG Energy Solution, is shifting part of its US battery production from EVs to energy storage systems (ESS). more…

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck gets long-awaited safety feature
item.description: Tesla is rolling out a new and long-awaited feature to the Cybertruck all-electric pickup, and it is a safety addition geared toward pedestrian and cyclist safety, as well as accidents with other vehicles. Tesla has announced the rollout of its innovative anti-dooring protection feature to the Cy...

item.title: Hyundai’s most affordable EV gets a ‘luxury’ upgrade — Here’s our first look at it [Video]
item.description: Hyundai launched the Casper Electric Lounge as the top-tier trim, featuring a “luxurious interior” and a new style. The Casper Electric is Hyundai’s most affordable electric vehicle, sold overseas as the Inster EV. more…

item.title: It Just Got Way Easier To Buy A Rivian In This State
item.description: A new law enabling direct-to-consumer sales means the Rivian R2 launch just got a huge boost.

item.title: Today’s Green Deals include EGO’s 21-inch touch drive mower, Anker 3,840Wh power station bundles, Segway e-scooters, more
item.description: Today’s 9to5Toys Green Deals is headlined by EGO’s 21-inch Select Cut cordless electric touch drive mower down at $779 alongside a near low on Anker’s 3,840Wh SOLIX F3800 power station bundles from $1,804 . You can also cash in on Segway’s ZT3 Pro e-scooter with Apple Find My for $850 and this 40...

item.title: Dems propose bill to cut energy costs that republicans hiked
item.description: As American energy costs spike, 120 House Democrats have introduced the Energy Bills Relief Act to bring back money-saving incentives that were repealed by republicans last year. more…

item.title: Tesla says FSD was off before Cybertruck crash — but the video tells a different story
item.description: A viral dashcam video shows a Tesla Cybertruck slamming into a concrete overpass barrier on a Houston highway while allegedly using “Full Self-Driving.” Elon Musk responded by saying Tesla’s logs show the driver disengaged the system 4 seconds before impact. Tesla fans jumped on this as yet anoth...

item.title: Buick launched this luxury electric van in China for $70,000
item.description: Yes, that’s a Buick , and it’s 100% electric. GM’s “affordable luxury” brand launched a new high-end seven-seater electric van in China priced around $70,000. more…

item.title: Tesla Roadster is ‘sorcery and magic’ and might be worth the wait, Uber founder says
item.description: Tesla is planning to unveil the Roadster in late April after years of waiting. But the wait might be worth it, according to Travis Kalanick, the founder of Uber, who recently shed some light on his expectations for the all-electric supercar. We all know the Roadster is supposed to have some serio...

item.title: Former Uber CEO says Waymo ‘obviously’ ahead of Tesla in robotaxi race
item.description: Travis Kalanick, the former CEO of Uber who helped pioneer the ride-hailing industry, says Waymo is “obviously” ahead of Tesla in the robotaxi race, and that Elon Musk’s company needs a “ChatGPT moment” for its vision-based autonomous driving to catch up. The comments came during an appearance on...

item.title: Elon Musk clarifies viral Tesla Cybertruck accident with driver logs
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk has clarified some details regarding the viral Tesla Cybertruck accident with company driver logs, which show various metrics at the time of an incident. The logs have been used in the past to pull responsibility off of Tesla when the automaker’s Full Self-Driving (Supervised)...

item.title: The new BMW i3 EV is a road trip monster with 440 miles of range, fast charging, and more
item.description: The new BMW i3 delivers where it matters most with 440 miles of range, 800V ultra-fast charging, and Neue Klasse EV style. more…

item.title: Washington opens Tesla’s direct EV sales loophole to Rivian and Lucid
item.description: Washington state legislators just voted overwhelmingly to allow Rivian and Lucid to sell electric vehicles directly to consumers, ending a 12-year arrangement that gave Tesla exclusive access to direct sales in the state. Senate Bill 6354 passed the House 84-9 and the Senate 47-2 — a bipartisan b...

item.title: Candela raises more cash scaling their flying electric ferries as global demand surges
item.description: Electric hydrofoiling boat maker Candela just pulled off something that’s getting harder to do in today’s climate tech landscape: raise a significant new round of funding – and do it while the rest of the sector is cooling off. more…

item.title: Velotric launches super lightweight e-bike that’s even lighter on your wallet
item.description: Velotric is taking a notable step into the growing lightweight e-bike segment with the launch of its new Tempo, a city-focused electric bike designed to feel much closer to a traditional bicycle than most of today’s heavier commuter models. more…

item.title: Tesla Just Outsold Every Other Car Brand Combined in Norway
item.description: submitted by /u/InternetSolid4166 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Model 3 Price Drop in Europe — Up to €4,000 Off with Tesla Bonus (March 2026)
item.description: Tesla has introduced the Tesla Bonus discount program in Europe, cutting Model 3 prices by up to €4,000 in select markets. Combined with referral code carlo719460 and government EV subsidies, the Model 3 can now be purchased for under €25,000 in some countries.

item.title: Tesla Robotaxi appears to be heading to a new U.S. city
item.description: Tesla Robotaxi appears to be heading to a new U.S. city, and although the company has revealed plans to launch in six new metros this year, it has yet to establish a new location outside of Austin and the Bay Area of California, where it has operated since last Summer. A lot full of Model Y vehic...

item.title: Tesla Roadster gets new unveiling date once again
item.description: The Tesla Roadster is perhaps the most anticipated vehicle in the company’s history, but those who have been waiting anxiously for it will have to push their timelines back once again. Tesla CEO Elon Musk has revealed that the company is once again pushing back the unveiling event that was origin...

item.title: Tesla named by U.S. Gov. in $4.3B battery deal for American-made cells
item.description: What began as an open secret in the energy industry is becoming more real after the U.S. Department of the Interior named Tesla as the stakeholder in the LG Energy Solution’s blockbuster $4.3 billion battery supply agreement. Tesla and LG Energy Solution are expanding their partnership to build a...

item.title: Tesla plans for largest Australian Supercharger yet
item.description: Tesla is planning to build its largest Supercharger in Australia yet, expanding on the infrastructure the company has built for electric vehicles. The company has a 20-stall site in the city of Goulburn in New South Wales, which is an ideal location for trips between Sydney and Canberra, two majo...

item.title: Tesla Model Y L gets new entertainment feature
item.description: Tesla is including a new entertainment feature in the Model Y L, improving the vehicle even further and making it what appears to be the best configuration of the all-electric crossover globally. Unfortunately, we in the U.S. do not yet have access to the vehicle, and the plans for it to enter th...

item.title: Elon Musk teases crazy outlook for xAI against its competitors
item.description: Elon Musk has never been one to shy away from crazy timelines, massive expectations, and outrageous outlooks. However, his recent plans for xAI and where he believes it will end up compared to its competitors are sure to stimulate conversation. In a bold and characteristic response on X, Elon Mus...

item.title: EV Sales Crashed 41% In January—But These Brands Still Grew
item.description: Almost all car brands suffered from declining sales. However, a handful of companies somehow managed to see their sales increase.

item.title: Total Mess at Elon Musk’s xAI, “Not Built Right” and “Being Rebuilt” — While Polluting Enormously
item.description: Everything is wonderful and perfect and industry leading at Elon Musk companies … until it is not. We’ve seen it time and time again at Tesla, where we find out about insanely stupid decisions and distractions long after the company scrambled to fix them and went down a new route. ...

item.title: Musk: "Terafab Project launches in 7 days"
item.description: submitted by /u/twinbee [link] [comments]

item.title: Why Is The Tesla Semi Still In Pilot Program Stage?
item.description: Tesla revealed its Semi (semi truck) nearly a decade ago. Many of us hoped for and expected a quick move to market and rapid scaling up. However, the process has gone much more slowly than I think anyone anticipated.
